clusters.justification: These terms map onto limbic and salience circuitry responsible for processing emotional valence, arousal, and mood state dysregulation.
This cluster reflects striatal and ventromedial prefrontal network functions that compute subjective significance to guide motivated behavior and reward-based decision making.
These terms rely on the Default Mode Network to process internally generated representations of agents, encompassing both self-referential identity and the modeling of others' minds.
